WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS 860 RESTAURANT LLC DBA OOLA RESTAURANT AND BAR AND FOUR PS GROUP LLC.

No appearances. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to March 30, 2020 at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, (E: maria.torreano@gmail.com) (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant Llc Dba Oola Restaurant And Bar And Four Ps Group Llc
Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Continued To Mar-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.'s Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant LLC Dba Oola Restaurant And Bar, And Four P's Group LLC is continued to Monday, March 16, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
